km.Padova, Veneto, Italy: ផាដុវ៉ា, វេនែតូ, ប្រទេសអ៊ីតាលី

zh.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara於1183年出生在義大利維圖帕多瓦。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1262年在他的家鄉享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara于1183年出生在意大利維圖帕多瓦。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1262年在他的家乡享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Carrara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Guido, Angelo, Alessandro, Amerigo, Antonio, Arrigo, Carlo, Enzo, Gaetano, Giovanni, Guerino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of various places called Carrara, from Latin carraria ‘quarry’.

nameMeanings.name: Gia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern name of uncertain origin, possibly an arbitrary coinage. In New Zealand and Australia it may have been inspired by the Maori phrase kia ora ‘be well’, which is used as a greeting or to wish someone good luck.

nameMeanings.name: Comino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Angel, Bernardo, Francisco, Manuel, Miguel, Adolfo, Alfonso, Alfredo, Ana, Asuncion, Carlos.  Italian Carmine, Domenic, Ciriaco, Egidio, Gino, Saverio.
Spanish: topographic name for someone who lived by a camino ‘path, way’ (from Late Latin caminus), or a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word.
Italian: metonymic occupational name from camino ‘chimney, furnace’.

variants.name: Caminero
meanings: Spanish: occupational name caminero for someone who travels or roams, for instance a hawker (see Camino ).

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara was born in 1183, in Padova, Veneto, Italy. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1262, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara est né en 1183, à Padova, Veneto, Italie. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1262, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara wurde 1183 in Padova, Veneto, Italien geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1262 im Alter von 79 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara è nato il nel 1183 nel Padova, Veneto, Italia. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1262, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.Padova, Veneto, Italy: イタリアベンエトープアドヴァ
ja.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carraraは1183年にイタリアベンエトープアドヴァで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1262年に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara(은)는 1183년 이탈리아 븐토 파도바에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1262년 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara nasceu em 1183, em Padova, Veneto, Itália. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1262, em sua cidade natal, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara родился в 1183 г. в местности падова, винето, Италия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1262 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Gia Comino II de Carrara nació en 1183, en Padova, Veneto, Italia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1262, en su pueblo, a la edad de 79 años.

th.Padova, Veneto, Italy: ปาโดแว, เฟเอนเอโทะ, อิตาลี
